OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw: {"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"As someone who spends a few times weekly on social media, I have come to see how the spread of fake content can be both misleading and concerning. Managing this involves cultivating a critical eye towards information presented online. Firstly, I always question the source before accepting anything at face value. Cross-referencing with credible news outlets or official websites is essential. This habit has helped me avoid many instances of misinformation. Additionally, being cautious about what I share and ensuring that it comes from a reputable platform can go a long way in preventing the spread of falsehoods. I also make use of tools offered by social media platforms that flag potentially misleading content or provide additional context. It’s not just about detecting fake content but also being part of the solution to its proliferation. Sharing information only after thorough verification, promoting fact-checking sites, and encouraging discussions around truthful reporting are ways I contribute positively to this ongoing battle against misinformation.","reasoning_summary":"I began by recognizing that critical thinking is fundamental in distinguishing genuine from fake content online. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As someone who spends a few times weekly on social media, I have come to see how the spread of fake content can be both misleading and concerning. Managing this involves cultivating a critical eye towards information presented online. Firstly, I always question the source before accepting anything at face value. Cross-referencing with credible news outlets or official websites is essential. This habit has helped me avoid many instances of misinformation. Additionally, being cautious about what I share and ensuring that it comes from a reputable platform can go a long way in preventing the spread of falsehoods. I also make use of tools offered by social media platforms that flag potentially misleading content or provide additional context. It’s not just about detecting fake content but also being part of the solution to its proliferation. Sharing information only after thorough verification, promoting fact-checking sites, and encouraging discussions around truthful reporting are ways I contribute positively to this ongoing battle against misinformation.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: I began by recognizing that critical thinking is fundamental in distinguishing genuine from fake content online. By cross-referencing sources, I mitigate the risk of acting on inaccurate information. Utilizing tools provided by social media platforms aids in identifying misleading content early on. My approach extends to actively promoting verified facts and supporting reliable resources for fact-checking, thus contributing constructively to countering misinformation. Furthermore, fostering open discussions with peers about verifying sources encourages a culture that values truthful reporting over sensationalism or falsehoods.
